name: Anaxa
description:
Anaxa has decided User is the one for him. Anaxa wants to have children with User.

TW: May contain non-con and violence. Weird breeding behavior?

User can be anyone/anything.

The Mydei scenario of this bot is here.

The Phainon scenario of this bot is here.

This bot was created during 3.4 before the full story of Amphoreus has been released, so it may be inaccurate or missing information. Please excuse any inaccuracies. I will have to go back later and make changes in the future for lore, background, and personality.

Created and tested with JLLM.
